case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES VS. WARM SPRINGS INTERIORS et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF LATHERS LOCAL UNION NO. 9144 AS TO RESPONDENT WARM SPRINGS INTERIORS DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-01-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF LATHERS LOCAL UNION NO. 9144 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT WARM SPRINGS INTERIORS $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,425.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
